channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Senate Democrats say they'll oppose GOP funding bill as government shutdown deadline looms
item.description: Sen. Chuck Schumer, D-N.Y., and other Senate Democrats said they'll oppose the six-month GOP government spending bill and want a one-month CR instead.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rubio could face an unfriendly reception from close G7 allies over Trump's policies
item.description: LA MALBAIE, Canada (AP) — U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio may be walking into unusually unfriendly territory this week when he meets his counterparts from the Group of 7 industrialized democracies — strong American allies stunned by President Donald Trump’s actions against them.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW LEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Idaho becomes first state to prefer death by firing squad for executions
item.description: Idaho Gov. Brad Little signed a bill on Wednesday making death by firing squad the preferred method for executions, and death by lethal injection the second preferred method.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Illinois Dem lawmaker pushes bill to legalize attacks on police for people having mental health episode
item.description: An Illinois lawmaker has introduced a bill that critics say will make it legal for anyone experiencing a mental health episode to attack police officers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tariffs stoke anxiety with Minnesota officials over uncertain impacts
item.description: Minnesota U.S. Senator Amy Klobuchar said she’s concerned about the consequences the tariffs imposed by the Trump administration. She spoke at a press conference Wednesday that featured a Minnesota farmer who worries about the impacts on agriculture.
item.dc:creator: Hannah Yang, MPR News

item.title: Trump vows to take back 'stolen' wealth as tariffs on steel and aluminum imports go into effect
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump openly challenged U.S. allies on Wednesday by increasing tariffs on all steel and aluminum imports to 25% as he vowed to take back wealth “stolen” by other countries, drawing quick retaliation from Europe and Canada.
item.dc:creator: JOSH BOAK, PAUL WISEMAN and ROB GILLIES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fox News Politics Newsletter: Green Thumbs Down
item.description: Welcome to the Fox News Politics newsletter, with the latest updates on the Trump administration, Capitol Hill and more Fox News politics content.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: In Rochester, a new program helps students’ families avoid eviction
item.description: In many cases, the cycle of homelessness can start with an eviction. Kids with unstable housing struggle to learn in school. So a new program in Rochester is preventing evictions from ever happening to kids and their families.
item.dc:creator: Catharine Richert, MPR News

item.title: Red light cameras coming to Las Vegas? Lawmaker wants exception that would allow them
item.description: Traffic cameras to catch drivers in the act of running red lights would be allowed under a bill introduced Tuesday at the Nevada Legislature.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: California exploiting Medicaid 'loophole' to pay billions for illegal immigrants' healthcare, study says
item.description: A new study is accusing California of exploiting a Medicaid funding loophole to funnel billions into healthcare for illegal immigrants.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Find common ground or dig in for battle? Arizona's top Democrats are taking different approaches
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Days after Donald Trump was elected to a second term, Arizona Gov. Katie Hobbs headed to the Mexican border with a conciliatory message. “Border security was a core issue of the Trump campaign,” she said.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN J. COOPER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump halts doubling of tariffs on Canadian metals after Ontario suspends electricity price hikes
item.description: The White House trade adviser Peter Navarro said the U.S. president pulled back on his doubling of steel and aluminum tariffs, even as the federal government still plans to place a 25 percent tariff on all steel and aluminum imports starting Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Pro-Trump California sheriff reacts to former Orange County Rep. Katie Porter's gubernatorial bid
item.description: Riverside County Sheriff Chad Bianco, who joined the race to be California’s next governor in February, has issued a statement reacting to former U.S. Rep. and Senate candidate Katie Porter, who announced her intent to run for governor Tuesday morning.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lone Democrat to back House GOP spending bill explains decision
item.description: Rep. Jared Golden (D-Maine) defied House Democratic leadership on Tuesday when he voted for the GOP’s bill to avert a government shutdown — the only one in the caucus to support the stopgap. Golden’s “yes” vote, to be sure, was not decisive, since Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: House Republicans pass bill to avert government shutdown
item.description: The House on Tuesday passed a funding bill to avert an end-of-the-week government shutdown, teeing up the measure for consideration in the Senate. The chamber cleared the continuing resolution (CR) in a largely party-line 217-213 vote, with just one Democrat — Rep.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, NewsNation

item.title: US added to human rights watchlist over Trump moves
item.description: The United States has been added to CIVICUS's monitor list of potential human rights threats due to President Trump's restrictive executive orders and institutional cutbacks, which are creating an atmosphere to chill democratic dissent.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Crisp, Fox 5
